# CORE Lab

> CORE Lab is a computer-vision and information-retrieval research group at the
> University of Information Technology (UIT), VNU-HCM, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam.

## Research focus
- Computer vision (visual recognition, detection, representation learning)
- Image & video retrieval (real-time, large-scale, interactive)
- Multimodal & multimedia learning (vision–language, speech, audio)
- Scene-text recognition / OCR (in-the-wild signboards, broadcast video)
- Multi-agent tracking
- Conversational image retrieval

## Highlights
- 1st place — Video Browser Showdown (VBS) 2025
- 3× consecutive wins — Ho Chi Minh AI Challenge

## Key pages
- Members: /people
- Publications: /publications
- Datasets: /datasets  (e.g. SignboardText — in-the-wild signboard scene text)
- Awards: /awards
- Conferences: /conferences
- Contact: /contact

## Contact
- Principal Investigator: Dr. Thanh Duc Ngo — thanhnd@uit.edu.vn
- Affiliation: University of Information Technology, VNU-HCM
